description: Composition Beige harem crinkled pants made of cotton mull, has waistband with drawstrings and fabric piping along the hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using mild detergent Dry in shade Do not soak These harem pants from fabindia are crafted from a soft, light, cotton mull fabric, and are designed to provide absolute comfort and perfect shape. Team them with long or short kurtas and ballerina flats or heeled sandals or slippers, dangle a pair of chunky earrings and you're all set to seize the day with a fab look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26&rdquo
